mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening aggregate demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms synchronized consumer and business demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 20-day returns (Rank IC < 0.01) over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative 5-day forward returns in > 60% of observations during monetary easing periods.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent monthly gains in nonfarm payrolls demonstrate sustained labor market tightening and rising wage pressures, supporting corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS momentum remains below 0.03 across all 3-year rolling windows, or positive payroll growth correlates with negative 20-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month CPI increase exceeding 0.3 percent signals accelerating inflation that forces central banks to tighten policy, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite the inflation threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between positive GDP growth and rising unemployment reveals inefficient resource allocation and weakening labor productivity, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns (Rank IC > 0.02) or shows no statistical separation from baseline in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in housing starts exceeding 50,000 units signals a sharp contraction in residential construction demand and related supply chains, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Negative housing start shocks yield positive 20-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances during tightening cycles.
